summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. All 33 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 5 languages (Spanish, English, Portuguese, German, French) are working correctly across dashboard, courses, flashcards, and profile pages.

minor.issue: French lesson 4 and 5 have content slightly under 200 chars (185 and 181 chars respectively), but all have 6+ vocabulary items and grammar points

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic warning only, does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 test features verified: 1) Backend returns 30 courses (5 langs x 6 levels), 2) French flashcards work, 3) French quizzes work with 10 questions, 4) Lessons have enriched content (vocabulary arrays, grammar_points), 5) French TTS works, 6) Login works, 7) Dashboard shows all 5 languages with flags, 8) Courses tab shows 30 courses with language/level filters, 9) Flashcards tab works for all languages, 10) Profile shows '5 Idiomas' stat, 11) Mi Progreso button shows alert with actual progress data, 12) Logout works correctly.

backend_enriched_lessons.details: Lessons have content >150 chars, 6+ vocabulary items, and grammar_points array

backend_french_tts.details: POST /api/tts/generate with french language returns audio_base64

frontend_login.details: Student login with testuser123@test.com works correctly

frontend_dashboard_5_languages.details: Dashboard shows Español, English, Português, Deutsch, Français with flags

frontend_courses_tab.details: Shows '30 Cursos Disponibles' with all 5 language filters

frontend_flashcards_tab.details: Flashcards tab loads with French option visible

frontend_profile_5_idiomas.details: Profile page shows '5 Idiomas' stat correctly

frontend_mi_progreso.details: Mi Progreso button shows alert with actual progress data (lessons, flashcards, quizzes, promedio, cursos)

frontend_logout.details: Cerrar Sesión button logs out and returns to welcome page
